creator: tmseck@web.de
text:
Thanks for your submission!

I am going to integrate the SQUID_KERB_AUTH and SQUID_NIS_AUTH options
into www/squid* when I update the ports. I am keeping these options "on"
by default however and will keep the tests for the old global make.conf
options {NO,WITHOUT}_{NIS,KERBEROS} in place so that the port's basic
behaviour will not change from the current status quo.
